name: Simple Egg Curry
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Vindaloo or hot curry paste
1 tbsp Chopped coriander or mint leaves
recipeInstructions:
Preparation time: 25 minutes
Cooking time: 20 minutes
Serves: 4-6
1. Boil the eggs in water with 1 teaspoon vinegar for 8-9 minutes. Remove to a large dish of cold water, and peel when cool.
2. Prick the eggs evenly all over with a fork and dry well.
3. Cook the onion, garlic, ginger, and chili in ghee or butter until golden and softened.
4. Add the Vindaloo or hot curry paste and cook briefly.
5. Add the coconut cream and 1/3 cup water.
6. Cook, stirring until the sauce thickens.
7. Heat oil for frying and deep-fry the eggs until golden on the surface.
8. Transfer to another pan. Add coriander and lemon juice to taste.
9. Simmer in the sauce for 8-9 minutes.
10. Serve with rice.
